title: campylotropis hirtella
intro: Campylotropis hirtella, also known as hairy bush clover, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Campylotropis hirtella include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
